query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS puzzles_raw;

CREATE TABLE puzzles_raw (
  PuzzleId VARCHAR(20) PRIMARY KEY,
  FEN TEXT NOT NULL,
  Moves TEXT NOT NULL,
  Rating INT,
  RatingDeviation INT,
  Popularity INT,
  NbPlays INT,
  Themes TEXT,
  GameUrl TEXT,
  OpeningTags TEXT
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute DROP TABLE IF EXISTS puzzles_raw;

CREATE TABLE puzzles_raw (
  PuzzleId VARCHAR(20) PRIMARY KEY,
  FEN TEXT NOT NULL,
  Moves TEXT NOT NULL,
  Rating INT,
  RatingDeviation INT,
  Popularity INT,
  NbPlays INT,
  Themes TEXT,
  GameUrl TEXT,
  OpeningTags TEXT
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
